context: Tests that agent uses page.mouse.click with calculated coordinates rather than locator.click inside the CloudWatch iframe.

checklist.name: Obtains iframe frame object
checklist.description: Code calls page.frame({ name: 'microConsole-Logs' }) or equivalent to get the iframe context

checklist.name: Does NOT use locator.click() on iframe elements
checklist.description: Code does not call .click() on a locator targeting an element inside the iframe

checklist.name: Gets iframe bounding box
checklist.description: Code calls boundingBox() on the iframe element from the outer page context

checklist.name: Gets row bounding box from frame
checklist.description: Code calls boundingBox() on the row element using the frame locator

checklist.name: Uses page.mouse.click with absolute coordinates
checklist.description: Code calls page.mouse.click(x, y) where x and y combine iframe and row offsets

checklist.name: Coordinate formula is correct
checklist.description: x = iframeBox.x + rowBox.x + offset, y = iframeBox.y + rowBox.y + rowBox.height/2 (or similar centred y)

checklist.name: Targets first row correctly
checklist.description: Code selects the first row (e.g. .first() or [0] index) not all rows
